allow: PowerShell($flutter = "C:\\Users\\User\\Desktop\\Nova pasta\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat"; & $flutter pub add flutter_riverpod go_router intl)

PowerShell($flutter = "C:\\Users\\User\\Desktop\\Nova pasta\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat"; Write-Output "=== ANALYZE ==="; & $flutter analyze --no-pub; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== TEST ==="; & $flutter test)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Node.js ==="; \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source\) -or "NOT FOUND"; node --version 2>$null; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== npm ==="; npm --version 2>$null; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Firebase CLI ==="; firebase --version 2>$null; if \($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0\) { Write-Output "NOT INSTALLED" }; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== FlutterFire CLI ==="; flutterfire --version 2>$null; if \($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0\) { Write-Output "NOT INSTALLED" }; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Dart pub global ==="; $dart = "C:\\Users\\User\\Desktop\\Nova pasta\\flutter\\bin\\dart.bat"; & $dart pub global list 2>$null)

PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat", "C:\\src\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat", "C:\\dev\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat", "$env:USERPROFILE\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat", "C:\\Users\\User\\fvm\\flutter_sdk\\bin\\flutter.bat", "C:\\Users\\User\\Documents\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; $local = Get-Content "android\\local.properties" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_ -match "flutter.sdk" }; Write-Output "local.properties: $local")
PowerShell($adb = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; if \(Test-Path $adb\) { & $adb devices -l } else { Write-Output "ADB nao encontrado em: $adb" })

PowerShell(Get-PnpDevice | Where-Object { $_.FriendlyName -match "LG|Android|ADB|K51" -or $_.Manufacturer -match "LG|Google" } | Select-Object Status, Class, FriendlyName, Manufacturer | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(Get-PnpDevice | Where-Object { $_.Status -eq "Error" -or $_.Status -eq "Unknown" -or $_.Problem -ne 0 } | Select-Object Status, Class, FriendlyName, Problem | Format-Table -AutoSize)
